subject: 📊 Daily Portfolio: Markets closed | ⚠️ NVDA $1 from stop · UNCY PDUFA Jun 27
html_body:
Portfolio Daily · Abbas Al MadaniSaturday, June 13 2026 · Kuwait (AST)
📅 NYSE Closed — Weekend
$827.15total account (Fri close)
Positions $613.34  ·  Cash $213.81
Open P&L vs cost basis: −$1.61 (−0.26%)· Realized banked: +$8.77
🎯 Withdrawal goal: $827.15 / $1,000— $172.85 to go (82.7% there)
Prices Fri Jun 12: NVDA $205.16 (Yahoo Finance ✓) · LLY $1,160.95 (Yahoo Finance ✓) · TSM $421.07 (Investing.com ✓) · AVGO ~$385.57 (estimate). VRDN $15.77 Jun 10 ✓. VERA ~$31.27 recent. No intraday movement today.
⚠️ Monday Pre-Market Watch — Two Key Levels
NVDA $205.16 — only $1.16 (0.57%) above the $204.00 stop
Any Monday gap-down could trigger this stop within minutes of open. Pre-decide: honor the $204 stop automatically, or set a hard alert at $203 (50-day MA, real structural support). Entry was $217.40; current loss −$16.96 (−5.65%). AI thesis intact — this is a stop discipline question, not a thesis question.
TSM $421.07 — TP1 zone ($427–435) is 1.4–3.3% away
Have a trim plan before open. Sell 50% (0.112 shares) at ~$432: gross +$4.89. After $3 commission: net +$1.89. Position is small — the math barely clears commission. Either take TP1 for +$1.89 net, or hold for TP2 ($485). Pre-decide so you are not reacting in market.
⏳ Pending Watchlist — Waiting on IBKR Approval
VRDNViridian TherapeuticsWATCH · 6/10
🔒 IBKR application pending — current broker does not allow this stock
$15.77Jun 10 confirmed−21.2% below entry target
Entry target: $20.00 · Stop: $14.50 · TP1: $28.00 · TP2: $37.00
⚠️ PRICE DROPPED — re-analyze before entering
VRDN has fallen −21.2% from the $20.00 entry target to $15.77 while waiting on broker approval. Original stop $14.50 is now only 8.1% below current price — far tighter than the original risk model. Run analyze VRDN to re-derive updated levels before entry.
Veligrotug for Thyroid Eye Disease (TED)🟢 17 days · June 30
Approval probability: 82% · Priority Review · BLA accepted · 24 analysts avg $34.20 (range $26–$50)
⚠️ Halal: UNVERIFIED — check Musaffa (interest income vs milestone revenue ratio unclear)
🔒 When IBKR approves: re-derive levels first. Only 17 days to PDUFA — entry window closing fast.
VERAVera TherapeuticsBUY NOW · 7/10
🔒 IBKR application pending — current broker does not allow this stock
$31.27recent (~Jun 12)−8.1% below target — still accessible
Entry target: $34.04 · Stop: $24.50 · TP1: $55.00 (sell 50%) · TP2: $78.00 (sell 50%)
Atacicept for IgA Nephropathy (IgAN)🟢 24 days · July 7
Approval probability: 89% · BTD + Priority Review · 14 analysts avg $78 (range $35–$110) · Zero CRLs in IgAN indication to date
BTD + p<0.0001 Phase 3 + FDA eGFR alignment + $5.28M director buy. At $31.27 you get a better entry than the original $34.04 analysis — if thesis intact. FDA/ORIGIN 3 alignment adds a potential full-approval leg post-PDUFA.
⚠️ Halal: UNVERIFIED — pre-revenue biotech, term debt structure needs Musaffa check
🔒 When IBKR approves: enter ~$31 market, stop $24.50. 24 days left — push IBKR application this week.
📡 Catalyst Plays — June 13, 2026
15-source FDA/clinical/options/insider scan · 1 confirmed PDUFA + 1 Phase 3 binary + 1 Tier-A fallback
UNCYUnicycive Therapeutics🟡 SOON · 14 DAYS
Catalyst: NDA resubmission decision — Oxylanthanum Carbonate (OLC) for hyperphosphatemia in dialysis patients (CKD)
PDUFA June 27 · Class II resubmission (prior CRL for manufacturing, not efficacy) · Market cap ~$180M · Price ~$7.60 · SI 8.56% · Cash $41.3M runway 2027
Probability: ~65–70% — Class II resubmission base rate ~78%; discounted for prior CRL credibility. Drug efficacy was never in question — manufacturing/CMC was the issue.
✅ APPROVAL
~$14–18 (+84–137%)
Class II approvals avg +80–120% day-of on small-cap. 12-mo analyst target $40.99.		💀 2ND CRL
~$3.50–4.50 (−41–54%)
Second CRL destroys credibility. Prior CRL low was ~$4.00.
EV on 30% position (~$54 deployable): (67% × +$6.40) − (33% × −$3.65) = +$3.09 expected value · Small position limits absolute dollar impact.
Smart money: 12-mo analyst target $40.99 vs ~$7.60 (439% implied upside) — no cluster insider buys confirmed
Halal: ⚠️ UNVERIFIED — kidney disease therapeutic, no obvious haram elements. Check Musaffa before entering.
CONVICTION: 3/5 · WATCH Say analyze UNCY for full deep dive
DFTXDefinium Therapeutics (fmr. MindMed)🟢 BY JUN 30
Catalyst: Phase 3 Voyage top-line readout — MM120 ODT for Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD)
Q2 2026 window (by Jun 30, ~17 days) · No exact date confirmed · Cash $237.9M · Three Phase 3 programs in 2026
Probability: ~45–55% — Psychiatry Phase 3 base rate ~40%; lifted by strong Phase 2 BTD signal and accelerated enrollment
✅ POSITIVE DATA
+50–80%
Phase 3 win triggers NDA filing; psychedelic therapy re-rating		💀 MISS
−40–60%
Lead program fails; entire DFTX thesis reprices
⚠️ Likely Halal Concern — check Musaffa FIRST
Pre-revenue with $237.9M cash → ~$12–15M/year interest income vs $0 product revenue. Likely exceeds AAOIFI 5% threshold. Verify Musaffa before any further analysis.
CONVICTION: 2/5 · WATCH (pending halal) Say analyze DFTX for full deep dive
ASMLASML Holding — Tier A Large-Cap FallbackNO CATALYST · SKIP
No confirmed 3rd catalyst play found — showing Tier A fallback. ASML = EUV lithography monopoly, halal-compliant, no near-term binary catalyst. Conviction 1/5. VRDN and VERA are the real catalyst plays tracked in this email.
💵 Cash — $213.81
After $6 reserve → $207.81 deployable · After $3 buy commission → $204.81 net. No trading today.
Monday options:
A — UNCY (~$7.60): ~27 shares ≈ $205 all-in. 14 days to PDUFA. Binary risk. Verify Musaffa first.
B — Hold for VERA/VRDN on IBKR: VERA at $31 needs ~$240. $204 gets close — highest-conviction use of idle cash.
C — Hold dry powder: NVDA stop $1.16 away. Stop trigger frees ~$283. Don't cluster a new buy on the same day the stop potentially fires.
Cleanest default: wait for Monday NVDA resolution, then deploy.
📚 Concept #17 of 30 — Options-Implied Move
The options market prices in the expected move size for every binary event before it happens — and right now it is actively doing this for both VRDN (Jun 30) and VERA (Jul 7). The mechanic: find the at-the-money call and put expiring right after the event, add their premiums (the straddle), and divide by the stock price. That percentage is what the market expects the stock to move ± around the decision. For mega-cap earnings it is ±7–9% for NVDA. For small-cap biotech PDUFAs like VRDN and VERA it is typically ±40–80%. Here is the trading implication: to profit on a long stock position through a PDUFA, the stock needs to move MORE than the implied move in your direction. If VRDN straddle prices ±50% and your approval probability is 82%, you are betting the market underprices the likelihood — that is the edge. Pull the Jun 30 expiry straddle on VRDN and Jul 11 on VERA before entry. If implied move already bakes in full upside, the risk/reward shrinks.
Also today: IV crush — implied volatility collapses the moment a binary event resolves. Long options lose value even if the stock moves right because the vol evaporates instantly. Long stock = no IV crush. Long calls into a PDUFA = fighting direction AND the vol collapse simultaneously.
Price sources (Fri Jun 12): NVDA $205.16 Yahoo Finance ✓ · LLY $1,160.95 Yahoo Finance ✓ · TSM $421.07 Investing.com ✓ · AVGO ~$385.57 estimate · VRDN $15.77 Jun 10 ✓ · VERA ~$31.27 recent.
Portfolio last updated: June 9, 2026 · Next US session: Monday June 15, 2026 9:30 AM ET (Kuwait 4:30 PM AST).
Research only — not financial advice. $3.00 exit commission deducted from all net P&L figures. Halal compliance requires independent Musaffa/AAOIFI verification before any new position.
